hypothesis: In de novo design targeting the alpha estrogen receptor, augmenting the FREED++ reward with an ensemble-derived protein 3D-pharmacophore consensus map combined with ligand-based CATS descriptors will produce molecules whose mean docking score across multiple receptor conformations is at least 1 kcal/mol more favorable and whose in vitro binding hit-rate (fraction with KD < 1 μM) is higher than that of molecules generated using ligand-only CATS-guided rewards.
